mnemonics.title: NFA 5-Tuple Memory
mnemonics.content: Q (Quantum of states), Σ (Sigma-symbol alphabet), δ (Delta-transition mapping), q₀ (queen-zero initial), F (Final accepting states)

mnemonics.title: Acceptance Rule
mnemonics.content: NFA accepts if ANY path reaches final (Existential) - Think: 'One lucky path is enough'

mnemonics.title: Powerset Construction
mnemonics.content: DFA state = SET of NFA states. If NFA has n states, DFA can have up to 2^n states (Power Set = All Subsets)

acronyms.usage: A finite automaton where transitions are not uniquely determined by current state and input
A finite automaton where exactly one transition exists for each state-input pair
Set of all states reachable from a given state using zero or more ε-transitions
The set of all subsets of Q, used as the codomain of NFA transition function
Algorithm to convert NFA to equivalent DFA by representing each DFA state as a set of NFA states

visualTips.visualization: Draw circles for states, labeled arrows for transitions. For same input going to multiple states, draw multiple arrows. Show ε-transitions with ε label or just ε symbol.
Use Venn diagram approach - each DFA state is a circle containing all NFA states that could be active simultaneously. Mark transitions between these sets.
Think of a tree - at each step, NFA branches into all possible next states. If ANY leaf path reaches final state, string is accepted.
Imagine fog spreading from a state - ε-transitions are like transparent paths the fog can drift through, reaching all reachable states.

analogies.analogy: DFA is like a one-way street with clear signs at every junction. NFA is like exploring a maze where you can try all possible paths simultaneously and succeed if ANY path leads to exit.
Like a person guessing the right answer on a multiple choice test - if there's ANY correct path, they succeed. The machine magically 'guesses' the right path.
Like walking through an automatic door that opens without you pressing any button - you move without any input.

analogies.analization: Like keeping track of ALL possible parallel universes where the NFA could be - each DFA state represents the set of all these parallel universe states.
